texto: Like a needle jabbed into your arm, reality stings you, hurting you more than your skin and flesh. You realize that you're nobody. The electricity's gone out, the darkness is your sudden enemy...you have to protect yourself from the dark. Otherwise the world goes out, along with the artificial lights from the power plant. The night once again disintegrates into atoms, changes from cultivated to wild, fitting itself afterward into its original black hues, its cat skin.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Georgi Tenev: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sabedoria. O trecho “Like a needle jabbed into your arm, reality stings you, hurting you more than your skin and flesh…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, change, vida pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.

frase_original: Like a needle jabbed into your arm, reality stings you, hurting you more than your skin and flesh. You realize that you're nobody. The electricity's gone out, the darkness is your sudden enemy...you have to protect yourself from the dark. Otherwise the world goes out, along with the artificial lights from the power plant. The night once again disintegrates into atoms, changes from cultivated to wild, fitting itself afterward into its original black hues, its cat skin.

texto: We did everything correctly, following the established plan approved by management!' Just as under socialism--we do and did everything correctly, yet life, the world, continues to collapse beneath our feet like a reactor that has entered a runaway state of nuclear meltdown. Is there any need to explain what those two great liberating words mean: chain reaction?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Georgi Tenev: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “We did everything correctly, following the established plan approved by management!' Just as unde…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, change, socialism pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e socialism.
